Omar Chehab
About Me Publications Posts Talks Teaching Contact

I am a last-year Ph.D. student at Inria, in the Mind team (formerly Parietal). I work with Alexandre Gramfort and Aapo Hyvärinen on statistical estimation of energy-based models.

I have a master’s degree in applied mathematics and engineering from ENSTA Paris, and a master’s degree in machine learning from ENS Paris-Saclay.

Last updated January 28, 2023.
